assumptions.assumption: A single mission view that joins mission summary, artifact lineage, blockers, and recommended next action would reduce operator reconstruction cost.
assumptions.break_test_question: Can operators answer the six core runtime questions from one surface without opening raw JSON?

assumptions.assumption: The next visibility improvement should derive from canonical runtime artifacts rather than invent a second source of truth.
assumptions.break_test_question: Can Mission Control be generated entirely from existing runtime artifacts plus narrow new summaries?

assumptions.assumption: The highest-leverage next step is bounded mission-control composition, not live pixel-office simulation or real-time autonomy claims.
assumptions.break_test_question: Would broader live visualization add more operator value than a smaller truthful mission-control surface?
